## Directory Structure

<!-- Generated by Claude after reading the project. Example:

```
src/
├── api/          # API route handlers
├── services/     # Business logic
├── repo/         # Database access layer
├── ui/           # Frontend components
├── utils/        # Shared utilities
└── types/        # Shared type definitions
```

## Dependency Direction

<!-- Define the allowed dependency flow. Example:

types → config → repo → services → api → ui

Rules:
- UI can import from services (via hooks/providers), not from repo directly
- Services can import from repo, not from api or ui
- Types can be imported by anyone
- No circular dependencies
-->

- Data validation: Zod schemas at API boundary
- State management: React Query for server state
- Authentication: JWT in httpOnly cookies
